name: 红光150m测距仪(J2N4A-150)
description: J2N4A-150 红光150m测距仪完整调试命令集 - 基于cmdanalyse.c CMDS表
author: J2N4A-150

commands.name: 频率1(159M)波形采集
commands.command: AA EE A0 00 00 00 00 A0 BB FF

commands.name: 频率2(134M)波形采集
commands.command: AA EE A1 00 00 00 00 A1 BB FF

commands.name: 频率3(160M)波形采集
commands.command: AA EE A2 00 00 00 00 A2 BB FF

commands.name: 频率4(129M)波形采集
commands.command: AA EE A3 00 00 00 00 A3 BB FF

commands.name: APD +2
commands.command: AA EE A4 00 00 00 00 A4 BB FF

commands.name: APD -2
commands.command: AA EE A5 00 00 00 00 A5 BB FF

commands.name: 滤波次数+2
commands.command: AA EE A6 00 00 00 00 A6 BB FF

commands.name: 滤波次数-1
commands.command: AA EE A7 00 00 00 00 A7 BB FF

commands.name: 频率1(159M)相位测试
commands.command: AA EE A8 00 00 00 00 A8 BB FF

commands.name: 频率2(134M)相位测试
commands.command: AA EE A9 00 00 00 00 A9 BB FF

commands.name: 频率3(160M)相位测试
commands.command: AA EE AA 00 00 00 00 AA BB FF

commands.name: 频率4(129M)相位测试
commands.command: AA EE AB 00 00 00 00 AB BB FF

commands.name: 搜索APD
commands.command: AA EE AC 00 00 00 00 AC BB FF

commands.name: 1.8mW内光路切换
commands.command: AA EE AD 00 00 00 00 AD BB FF

commands.name: 0.8mW外光路切换
commands.command: AA EE AE 00 00 00 00 AE BB FF

commands.name: 读取校准数据
commands.command: AA EE 01 00 00 00 00 01 BB FF

commands.name: 相位校准
commands.command: AA EE 02 00 00 00 00 02 BB FF

commands.name: 速度校准
commands.command: AA EE 09 00 00 00 00 09 BB FF

commands.name: 设备号校准
commands.command: AA EE 90 00 00 00 00 90 BB FF

commands.name: 内光路校准
commands.command: AA EE 04 00 00 00 00 04 BB FF

commands.name: 内光路校准结束
commands.command: AA EE 05 00 00 00 00 05 BB FF

commands.name: 切换调试模式
commands.command: AA EE 03 00 00 00 00 03 BB FF

commands.name: 测量数据
commands.command: AA EE 0C 00 00 00 00 0C BB FF

commands.name: 拟合测试
commands.command: AA EE CC 00 00 00 00 CC BB FF

commands.name: 模式测试
commands.command: AA EE BC 00 00 00 00 BC BB FF

commands.name: 温度校准
commands.command: AA EE 11 00 00 00 00 11 BB FF

commands.name: 温度检查
commands.command: AA EE 12 00 00 00 00 12 BB FF

commands.name: 0.8mW外光路开启
commands.command: AA EE 13 00 00 00 00 13 BB FF

commands.name: 发射开启
commands.command: AA EE D1 00 00 00 00 D1 BB FF

commands.name: 发射关闭
commands.command: AA EE D2 00 00 00 00 D2 BB FF

commands.name: 测距(带校准)
commands.command: AA EE D3 00 00 00 00 D3 BB FF

commands.name: 设置波特率
commands.command: AA EE D4 00 00 00 00 D4 BB FF

commands.name: 获取波特率
commands.command: AA EE D5 00 00 00 00 D5 BB FF

commands.name: 后端基准
commands.command: AA EE D6 00 00 00 00 D6 BB FF

commands.name: 前端基准
commands.command: AA EE D7 00 00 00 00 D7 BB FF

commands.name: 查看硬件版本
commands.command: AA EE D8 01 00 00 00 D8 BB FF

commands.name: 查看软件版本
commands.command: AA EE D9 01 00 00 00 D9 BB FF

protocol.name: J2N4A-150 Phase Ranging Protocol
protocol.frameFormat: AA EE CMD DATA[4] XOR BB FF
protocol.xorCheck: Rxbuffer[7] = CMD ^ DATA[0] ^ DATA[1] ^ DATA[2] ^ DATA[3]
protocol.description: J2N4A-150红光150m相位测距仪串口协议, 4频率(159M/134M/160M/129M)相位测距, USART0 DMA收发
